news:news.news:title: Iran-backed hackers breach FBI director's emails, while tensions rise in the Middle East and humanitarian crises unfold in Cuba and the West Bank.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran cyber attacks, Tiger Woods DUI charges, Cuba aid crisis, West Bank violence, Belarus North Korea relations

news:news.news:title: US stock markets closed down for the fifth consecutive week amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions related to the Iran war.
news:news.news:keywords: US stock market trends, impact of Iran war on economy, minimum wage increase discussions, US Postal Service fuel surcharge, Trump's economic policies

news:news.news:title: Sony has suspended memory card sales due to shortages, while various tech products are on sale during the Big Spring Sale event.
news:news.news:keywords: Sony memory card shortage, Insta360 webcam discount, Trump phone updates, data centers and AI, Anker charger sale

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods was arrested on suspicion of DUI following a car crash, while the Connecticut Sun franchise is set to relocate to Houston in 2027.
news:news.news:keywords: March Madness updates, Tiger Woods DUI news, WNBA franchise relocation, Iowa coaching news, NFL draft buzz

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include breakthroughs in bee nutrition, space weather monitoring, and cancer treatment, highlighting the diverse advancements in research.
news:news.news:keywords: bee nutrition breakthroughs, space weather monitoring, cancer treatment advancements, animal intelligence studies, ocean species extinction

news:news.news:title: Ukraine seeks drone deals amid rising tensions, while African nations face oil supply disruptions and various legal and political issues unfold globally.
news:news.news:keywords: Ukraine drone technology negotiations, Impact of Iran war on Africa, Voter intimidation in Hungary, Euthanasia legal battles in Europe, Legal issues surrounding Venezuelan wealth

news:news.news:title: US markets experienced significant declines amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, while rising energy costs impact various sectors and consumer services.
news:news.news:keywords: US market decline analysis, impact of Iran war on global economy, Ticketmaster fee changes, Clear app popularity surge, US Postal Service fuel surcharge

news:news.news:title: Anthropic temporarily blocked a Pentagon ban while Apple discontinues the Mac Pro and introduces new AI features for Siri.
news:news.news:keywords: AI legal battles, Apple product discontinuation, AI integration with Siri, robot vacuum sales, streaming service price hikes

news:news.news:title: Purdue advances to the Elite 8 in March Madness, while MLB Opening Day features record strikeouts and notable player performances.
news:news.news:keywords: March Madness Sweet 16 updates, MLB Opening Day highlights, Alec Bohm lawsuit news, Geno Auriemma Title IX comments

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries highlight the intelligence of animals, the complexities of sleep, and advancements in understanding diseases and potential extraterrestrial life.
news:news.news:keywords: animal intelligence research, sleep and dreaming studies, long COVID immune response, Parkinson's disease research, exoplanet habitability

news:news.news:title: Iran Conflict Escalates, Driving Global Market Prices Higher as Sony Raises PS5 Costs by $100
Ukraine Pursues Drone Deals as US Markets Plunge Amid Geopolitical Unrest
